summary: AgentForge v47 Pipeline Streaming Fix - Testing delegation pipeline auto-chain with new /api/delegate/stream endpoint. Backend 12/12 passed. Frontend pipeline verified end-to-end: COMMANDER auto-delegates to ATLAS and FORGE, send button stays disabled throughout, files saved after code generation.

minor.issue: Message model missing 'delegations' List field - delegation history not persisted to DB (delegations always=0 in all stored messages). After page refresh, COMMANDER's 'Delegated to ATLAS/FORGE' Execute blocks don't re-appear because delegations are not saved.
minor.affected_file: /app/backend/models/base.py - class Message needs delegations: List[Dict] = [] field

integration_issues.issue: COMMANDER's delegation blocks ('Delegated to ATLAS', 'Delegated to FORGE' with Execute buttons) disappear after page refresh because delegations are not persisted in DB. The Execute button for manual re-triggering only works during the current session, not after reload.
integration_issues.priority: MEDIUM - consequence of missing delegations field in Message model

passed_tests: ✅ /api/delegate validates delegate_to requirement (400)
✅ /api/delegate returns 404 for unknown agent
✅ /api/delegate now returns 'delegations' field (the fix - was missing before)
✅ /api/delegate/stream exists and returns SSE text/event-stream content-type (new endpoint)
✅ /api/delegate/stream validates missing delegate_to (400)
✅ /api/delegate/stream returns 404 for unknown agent
✅ /api/delegate/stream emits 'start' event with agent info (id, name, role, avatar)
✅ /api/delegate/stream emits 'content' events during LLM generation
✅ /api/delegate/stream 'done' event has 'code_blocks' array
✅ /api/delegate/stream 'done' event has 'delegations' array
✅ /api/delegate/stream full sequence correct: start → content... → done
✅ /api/pipeline/agents available (12 agents in config)
✅ /api/chat/stream exists and returns SSE
✅ Home page loads, Studio shows projects, Project workspace accessible
✅ Chat input (data-testid='chat-input') works - accepts text input
✅ Send button (data-testid='send-btn') disabled when empty, enabled when text present
✅ COMMANDER responds via streaming in chat after message sent
✅ COMMANDER delegation blocks ('Delegated to ATLAS', 'Delegated to FORGE') appeared in chat with Execute buttons
✅ ATLAS auto-ran after COMMANDER (no manual Execute click needed) - PIPELINE FIX VERIFIED
✅ FORGE auto-ran after ATLAS delegation (chain auto-execution working)
✅ Console: '[Pipeline] COMMANDER issued delegations: [ATLAS, FORGE]' confirmed
✅ Console: '[Pipeline] → ATLAS' and '[Pipeline] → FORGE' confirmed in sequence
✅ Send button stayed disabled throughout entire COMMANDER→ATLAS→FORGE pipeline (no ping-pong)
✅ Files saved after FORGE code generation: 3 C++ files (AS_PlayerCharacter.h, HealthComponent.h, HealthComponent.cpp)
✅ isChainCall=true prevents setSending ping-pong mid-pipeline
action_items: Add 'delegations: List[Dict] = []' field to Message model in /app/backend/models/base.py
In /api/chat/stream (lines 779-790), pass delegations=delegations when creating Message object to persist delegation history
In /api/delegate/stream (lines 903-915), pass delegations=delegations when creating Message object
This ensures COMMANDER's delegation blocks re-appear after page refresh and Execute buttons work for re-triggering
critical_code_review_comments: MEDIUM: Message model missing 'delegations' field - `/app/backend/models/base.py` class Message needs `delegations: List[Dict] = []` - without this, delegation history is lost on page refresh and Execute re-trigger buttons don't show
INFO: /api/pipeline/agents returns dict keyed by role (not list) - frontend should handle both formats
INFO: The streaming fix works correctly - SSE prevents proxy timeouts on LLM calls over 30s
INFO: isChainCall=true pattern in executeDelegation correctly prevents send button flicker during pipeline

success_rate.frontend: 95% - Core pipeline working, minor issue with delegation persistence after refresh

seed_data_creation: Tested with existing project 'OceanMapSurvivalGame' (878a623f-111e-45df-a837-7821bace9c1a). 3 new files added: AbyssalShores/Source/AbyssalShores/Player/CppClasses/AS_PlayerCharacter.h, HealthComponent.h, HealthComponent.cpp
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline streaming fix v47 verified working. COMMANDER → ATLAS → FORGE auto-chain confirmed. The one outstanding issue is Message model missing 'delegations' field which prevents delegation block persistence after page refresh. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_v47_pipeline_streaming.py (12 tests). Project ID for testing: 878a623f-111e-45df-a837-7821bace9c1a

rca_of_issue.issue: Delegation blocks disappear after page refresh
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Message model in /app/backend/models/base.py does not have a 'delegations' field. When the Message is saved to MongoDB, delegation info is dropped. Frontend reads delegations from SSE done event (live session only) but not from DB (no persistence).
rca_of_issue.reproduction: 1. Send a message that triggers COMMANDER delegating to ATLAS/FORGE. 2. See delegation blocks with Execute buttons appear. 3. Refresh the page. 4. COMMANDER's message no longer shows 'Delegated to ATLAS' blocks.
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Add `delegations: List[Dict] = []` to Message class in models/base.py, and pass `delegations=delegations` when constructing Message objects in both /api/chat/stream and /api/delegate/stream endpoints
